# [Free live training] Earn passive income by launching a digital store 

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-04-19 13:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 707

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Ready to transform your WordPress site into a profitable digital
product store?

Whether you're selling ebooks, courses, templates, or any digital
downloads, this training will show you the fastest path from idea
to launching your store, saving you weeks of trial and error.

I've seen a lot of people give up on their dreams of selling
online because they think it's too complicated. But with the
right guidance, launching your store is easy.

Reserve your spot now to get instant access to our exclusive
Digital Store Launch Training 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Dq8ibHAj827T53fV5Q7tYF2iPUPXKd81lTEHKQDf1N0 ) on April
30th, 10.30 am EST. Plus, live Q&A to address your specific
questions and challenges.

In this workshop, you'll:

* Learn how to set up your online store correctly
* Find essential tools & strategies to get sales
* Learn how keep your store running smoothly

You're invited! Get your free spot today!

👉 Free Live Training: Launch a Digital Product Store in 90
Minutes! ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Dq8ibHAj827T53fV5Q7tYF2iPUPXKd81lTEHKQDf1N0 ) 👈

Talk soon,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
